name: google-keep-search
title: Google Keep Search
description: Search Google Keep notes from Raycast.
author: giorgio-zamparelli

preferences.name: personalKeepPythonPath
preferences.title: Personal Keep Python Executable
preferences.description: Used only by the experimental personal Gmail proof of concept. It must be Python 3.10+ with the README's pinned companion dependencies.

commands.name: search-workspace-keep-notes
commands.title: Search Workspace Keep Notes
commands.subtitle: Google Keep
commands.description: Search Google Workspace Keep notes using Google's official read-only API.

preferences.name: googleClientId
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: Create an iOS client with bundle ID com.raycast; see the README.

commands.name: search-personal-google-keep-notes
commands.title: Search Personal Google Keep Notes
commands.subtitle: Google Keep · Experimental
commands.description: Search personal Gmail Keep notes through a local, unofficial gkeepapi companion.

commands.name: setup-personal-google-keep
commands.title: Set up Personal Google Keep POC
commands.subtitle: Google Keep · Experimental
commands.description: Set up the local, opt-in proof of concept for personal Gmail Keep search.

commands.name: search-google-keep-in-browser
commands.title: Search Google Keep in Browser
commands.subtitle: Google Keep
commands.description: Open Google Keep's own search for a query. Works with personal and Workspace accounts.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
scripts.test: vitest run && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'personal_keep_bridge_test.py'
